---
title: "Datasets and data cards"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

Each dataset used in the course has a **data card**: the same six sections students draft in the [microbiome data card](cards/microbiome-mouse-16s.qmd) (source, outcome, predictors, sample size, leakage risks, subgroups). Use these pages as instructor references or starting points for your own one-pager.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## Adding a dataset later

1. Add an entry to [`datasets.yml`](datasets.yml).  
2. Create `cards/your-dataset.qmd` using the six sections below any other card.  
3. Add a row to the catalog table on this page.
:::

## Catalog

| Dataset | Kind | Card | Used for |
|---------|------|------|----------|
| [Old Faithful eruptions](cards/old-faithful.qmd) | Real (base R) | [Open card](cards/old-faithful.qmd) | Day 1 ggplot intro |
| [Hald cement](cards/hald-cement.qmd) | Real (classic) | [Open card](cards/hald-cement.qmd) | Day 1 correlated predictors |
| [Synthetic gene x trait](cards/gene-trait-simulation.qmd) | Simulated | [Open card](cards/gene-trait-simulation.qmd) | Day 1-2 regression, LASSO, trees |
| [Synthetic gene x disease](cards/gene-disease-simulation.qmd) | Simulated | [Open card](cards/gene-disease-simulation.qmd) | Day 1-2 logistic, trees |
| [Palmer Penguins](cards/palmer-penguins.qmd) | Real | [Open card](cards/palmer-penguins.qmd) | Notebooks, modules, Day 2-4 slides |
| [Mouse 16S microbiome](cards/microbiome-mouse-16s.qmd) | Real | [Open card](cards/microbiome-mouse-16s.qmd) | Day 2 and Day 4 afternoon labs |

::: {.hub-grid}
::: {.hub-card}
::: {.hub-pill}
Real data
:::
### Palmer Penguins

Our main **real** running example all week: regression, classification, pipelines, metrics.

[Open data card](cards/palmer-penguins.qmd)
:::

::: {.hub-card}
::: {.hub-pill}
Simulated
:::
### Gene simulations

We wrote the rules so we know which genes should matter (trait and disease tracks).

[Trait card](cards/gene-trait-simulation.qmd) · [Disease card](cards/gene-disease-simulation.qmd)
:::

::: {.hub-card}
::: {.hub-pill}
Labs
:::
### Microbiome (mouse 16S)

Repeated measures per mouse; **grouped CV** is required.

[Open data card](cards/microbiome-mouse-16s.qmd)
:::
:::

## Data card template (student version)

1. **Source** - where did rows come from?  
2. **Outcome** - what are you predicting? units / levels?  
3. **Predictors** - what measurements? how many?  
4. **Sample size** - *n*; any missing values?  
5. **Leakage risks** - repeated measures? normalization on full table? selection bias?  
6. **Subgroups** - sex, batch, island, individual ID - for later fairness checks  

Example student answer: [Day 1 gene simulation solution](../exercises/solutions/day01-data-card-example.qmd).
